timeAtRisks.description: Patients were assumed at-risk of kidney failure after the third anti-VEGF exposure until the end of continuous drug exposure or the end of the study period.

psSettings.description: 1:1 propensity score matching using large-scale PS and L1 regularization

outcomeModels.description: Conditional Cox model on PS strata
Cox model conditioned on PS matched sets
Cox proportional hazards conditioned on PS
